title: Assigning a Person to a task ... can I also get more info?

posts.author: nmalexandersen (Nils Morten Alexandersen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all … Hope you are doing great.

When you add a user to your Monday.com account there are some metadata that can be added… I.e. email address and phone number.

When you assign a person to a task in Monday.com you can place your mouse pointer over the “person” and get a readout of email and phone details … but not the other metadata on the user account … i.e. custom fields like department and so on —

Is there a trick to mirror these metadata fields to a board, when assigning a person … i.e.user data into a phone column, an email, column and so on `

Kind regards Nils
